deploy.startCommand:
bash -c '
echo "========== ENVIRONMENT CHECK =========="
echo "PORT: $PORT"
echo "HOST: $HOST"
echo "NODE_ENV: $NODE_ENV"
echo "SUPABASE_URL: $SUPABASE_URL"
echo "SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY length: ${#SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY}"
echo "SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY length: ${#SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY}"
echo "RESEND_API_KEY length: ${#RESEND_API_KEY}"
echo ""
echo "========== FILE CHECK =========="
echo "dist/server/server.js exists:"
ls -lh dist/server/server.js
echo ""
echo "========== NODE VERSION =========="
node --version
echo ""
echo "========== STARTING SERVER =========="
echo "Time: $(date)"
echo "Command: node dist/server/server.js"
echo ""
exec node dist/server/server.js
'
